calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Issue Writ Of Mandamus Compelling Disclosure Of Improperly Withheld Public Records Under The California Public Records Act (Cal. Gov. Code 6259) And Art. 1, Sec. 3 Of The California Constitution
Off Calendar Apr-06-2020 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Michael Aguirre, Esq. and Maria C. Severson, Esq. of Aguirre & Severson LLP, T:619.876.5364, for petitioner/ moving party;
Aaron Jones, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, T:415.510.3805, for respondent.

RULING: The tentative ruling on PETITIONER MICHAEL AGUIRRE's Motion To Issue Writ Of Mandamus Compelling Disclosure Of Improperly Withheld Public Records Under The California Public Records Act (Cal. Gov. Code 6259) And Art. 1, Sec. 3 Of The California Constitution was contested. The matter was argued. Mr. Aguirre's request for permission to file supplemental briefs was granted.

No later than March 18, 2020, parties are to submit concurrent supplemental briefs limited to 5 pages addressing issues discussed at the hearing and additional authorities. The Court will take the matter under submission upon receipt of the briefs.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Issue Writ Of Mandamus Compelling Disclosure Of Improperly Withheld Public Records Under The California Public Records Act (Cal. Gov. Code 6259) And Art. 1, Sec. 3 Of The California Constitution
Off Calendar Mar-02-2020 Continued To Mar-04-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PETITIONER MICHAEL AGUIRRE's Motion To Issue Writ Of Mandamus Compelling Disclosure Of Improperly Withheld Public Records Under The California Public Records Act (Cal. Gov. Code 6259) And Art. 1, Sec. 3 Of The California Constitution is continued on the court's own motion to Wednesday, March 4.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
